sentences.en: The customer lifetime value for premium users is 5 times higher than free-tier users.
sentences.zh: 高级用户的客户生命周期价值是免费用户的5倍。

sentences.en: We should optimize the top of the funnel before increasing spend on awareness campaigns.
sentences.zh: 在增加品牌认知活动支出之前，我们应该先优化漏斗顶部。

sentences.en: The net promoter score jumped from 32 to 48 after the app redesign.
sentences.zh: App改版后，净推荐值从32跃升至48。

sentences.en: Cross-selling brokerage services to existing banking customers is our biggest lever.
sentences.zh: 向现有银行客户交叉销售经纪服务是我们最大的杠杆点。

sentences.en: The lookalike audience on social platforms outperformed interest-based targeting.
sentences.zh: 社交平台上的相似受众表现优于兴趣定向投放。

example.en: Increasing lifetime value is more cost-effective than acquiring new users.
example.zh: 提升生命周期价值比获取新用户更具成本效益。

example.en: A net promoter score above 50 is considered world-class.
example.zh: 净推荐值超过50被认为是世界级水平。

example.en: Cross-selling increases revenue per customer without additional acquisition cost.
example.zh: 交叉销售在不增加获客成本的情况下提升每客收入。

example.en: We built a lookalike audience based on our top 1% spenders.
example.zh: 我们基于消费最高的1%用户构建了相似受众。

example.en: The campaign generated 2 million impressions in the first week.
example.zh: 该活动在第一周产生了200万次曝光。

sentences.en: The load time on the market data page needs to be under 500 milliseconds.
sentences.zh: 行情数据页面的加载时间需要控制在500毫秒以内。

sentences.en: We introduced a feedback widget that captures user sentiment in real time.
sentences.zh: 我们引入了一个反馈组件，可以实时捕获用户情绪。

sentences.en: The tech debt backlog has grown to 30% of the total sprint capacity.
sentences.zh: 技术债积压已经增长到总冲刺容量的30%。

sentences.en: Our mobile app received a 4.7 rating on the App Store after the latest update.
sentences.zh: 最新更新后，我们的移动应用在App Store上获得了4.7的评分。

sentences.en: The data pipeline failed silently, causing stale prices to be displayed for two hours.
sentences.zh: 数据管道静默失败，导致过期价格显示了两个小时。

example.en: Ignoring tech debt eventually slows down feature delivery.
example.zh: 忽视技术债最终会拖慢功能交付速度。

example.en: Market sentiment turned bearish after the trade war escalation.
example.zh: 贸易战升级后，市场情绪转为看跌。

example.en: The product backlog should be groomed and prioritized every sprint.
example.zh: 产品待办列表应该每个冲刺进行梳理和排序。

example.en: Stale cache data caused users to see outdated portfolio values.
example.zh: 过期的缓存数据导致用户看到过时的持仓价值。

example.en: We guarantee 99.95% uptime in our service level agreement.
example.zh: 我们在服务等级协议中保证99.95%的正常运行时间。

sentences.en: The market capitalization of the company surpassed 100 billion dollars this week.
sentences.zh: 该公司的市值本周突破了1000亿美元。

sentences.en: Analysts downgraded the stock from buy to hold after the weak guidance.
sentences.zh: 在疲弱的业绩指引之后，分析师将该股从买入下调至持有。

sentences.en: The put-call ratio suggests bearish sentiment among options traders.
sentences.zh: 看跌/看涨期权比率表明期权交易者中存在看跌情绪。

sentences.en: Revenue per user increased 18% after launching the margin trading feature.
sentences.zh: 上线融资融券功能后，每用户收入增长了18%。

sentences.en: The SPAC merger is expected to close by the end of Q3.
sentences.zh: SPAC合并预计将在第三季度末完成。

example.en: Apple's market capitalization makes it the most valuable public company.
example.zh: 苹果的市值使其成为最有价值的上市公司。

example.en: The downgrade triggered a 5% sell-off in the stock.
example.zh: 评级下调触发了该股票5%的抛售。

example.en: A rising put-call ratio indicates growing fear in the market.
example.zh: 看跌/看涨期权比率上升表明市场恐慌情绪加剧。

example.en: Margin trading amplifies both gains and losses.
example.zh: 融资融券交易同时放大了收益和亏损。

example.en: Going public through a SPAC can be faster than a traditional IPO.
example.zh: 通过SPAC上市可能比传统IPO更快。

sentences.en: The OKR scoring shows that two of three key results are on track.
sentences.zh: OKR评分显示三个关键结果中有两个在正轨上。

sentences.en: We should rotate the scrum master role to build leadership skills across the team.
sentences.zh: 我们应该轮换Scrum Master角色，以培养团队中的领导力。

sentences.en: The talent density of the team improved after raising the hiring bar.
sentences.zh: 提高招聘标准后，团队的人才密度提升了。

sentences.en: Please document the decision and rationale in the meeting minutes.
sentences.zh: 请在会议纪要中记录决定和理由。

sentences.en: The manager gave specific, actionable feedback using the SBI framework.
sentences.zh: 经理使用SBI框架给出了具体、可执行的反馈。

example.en: The project is on track to deliver by the end of the month.
example.zh: 项目在正轨上，预计月底交付。

example.en: Netflix attributes its success to maintaining high talent density.
example.zh: Netflix将其成功归因于保持高人才密度。

example.en: Always document the rationale behind major technical decisions.
example.zh: 始终记录重大技术决策背后的理由。

example.en: Good feedback is specific, timely, and actionable.
example.zh: 好的反馈是具体的、及时的、可执行的。

example.en: Raising the hiring bar means every new hire should raise the team average.
example.zh: 提高招聘标准意味着每个新员工都应该拉高团队平均水平。

sentences.en: The winner-takes-all dynamics in this market make early scaling critical.
sentences.zh: 这个市场赢者通吃的特性使得早期扩张至关重要。

sentences.en: Our differentiation comes from combining social features with trading tools.
sentences.zh: 我们的差异化来自于将社交功能与交易工具相结合。

sentences.en: The strategic review concluded that we should exit the Taiwan market.
sentences.zh: 战略评审得出结论，我们应该退出台湾市场。

sentences.en: Building a proprietary data moat requires sustained investment over multiple years.
sentences.zh: 构建专有数据护城河需要多年的持续投资。

sentences.en: The adjacency expansion into wealth management unlocks a new revenue pool.
sentences.zh: 向财富管理的相邻扩展开辟了新的收入池。

example.en: Platform businesses often exhibit winner-takes-all dynamics.
example.zh: 平台型业务通常呈现赢者通吃的特征。

example.en: Product differentiation is key to avoiding price wars.
example.zh: 产品差异化是避免价格战的关键。

example.en: Our proprietary algorithm gives us an edge in trade execution speed.
example.zh: 我们的专有算法使我们在交易执行速度上占有优势。

example.en: Expanding into adjacencies can drive growth without entering entirely new markets.
example.zh: 向相邻业务扩展可以在不进入全新市场的情况下推动增长。

example.en: The total revenue pool in Asia-Pacific fintech is estimated at $30 billion.
example.zh: 亚太金融科技的总收入池估计为300亿美元。
